message:
bd-2wds9: fix debug_assert side effect in ScheduledSet collision path

The overflow.insert(old_task) call was inside debug_assert!(), which is
elided in release builds. This caused the old task to be lost from the
overflow set during generation collisions, leading to len counter drift
and incorrect dedup behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
